metadata.name: Investigate and Resolve a Customer Deduction

description: A collections specialist is investigating a large deduction taken by a major customer for a disputed marketing co-op fee.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the details of the deduction case, including the amount and customer reason.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the case details for the co-op fee deduction.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the customer's marketing agreement to verify the terms of the co-op program.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the agreement and confirms the fee is valid.

nodes.task_description: Deny the deduction as invalid and communicate this to the customer, providing the contract as proof.

expected_outcome.value: Agent updates the case status to 'Denied' and sends a communication to the customer requesting payment of the deducted amount.
